system.description:
Source: Anime 5E Fifth Edition Core Rules, p. 54.

Hit Die: d6. Primary Ability: Dexterity. Saving Throws: Dexterity, Constitution, Wisdom.

Rules Summary: Flexible class for characters who want broad freedom, bonus points, and room to grow into nearly any adventuring role.

Proficiencies: Light and medium armour; simple weapons; select 2 martial weapons.
system.progressionNotes: Adventurers gain unrestricted Bonus Points instead of fixed class Attributes as they advance. Source: Anime 5E Fifth Edition Core Rules, PDF pp. 56-57.

progression.proficiencies: Light and medium armour; simple weapons; two martial weapons of choice; two tools of choice; Dexterity, Constitution, and Wisdom saves; five skills of choice.
progression.notes: d6 Hit Dice; 6 + Constitution modifier HP at 1st level.

system.description:
Source: Anime 5E Fifth Edition Core Rules, p. 56.

Hit Die: d8. Primary Ability: Constitution. Saving Throws: Constitution, Wisdom.

Rules Summary: Element- or theme-focused power wielder who develops Dynamic Powers, protection, and a narrow but potent supernatural specialty.

Proficiencies: Light armour; shields; simple weapons; select 4 martial weapons.
system.progressionNotes: Progression encoded from Anime 5E Fifth Edition Core Rules, PDF pp. 58-59. Multiclass duplicate benefit and reallocation handling is currently shown as a warning rather than automated.
